Ltd. having its registered office 2"d Floor, Centric Plaza, Plot No. 8, Packet- 4. Sector-l 1, Dwarka, New Delhi-110075 (hereinafier referred to as the “Concessionaire”), the successful bidder for bids submitted on 01.02.2012 for the development of UP/I-Iaryana Border-Yamunanagar-Saha-Barwala-Panchkula Section from Km 71.640 to Km 179,249 on National Highway No. 73 (hereinafier referred to as the “said section") to four laning, operation and maintenance of the said Section. ’ Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008 published vide GSR 838 (E) dated 05.12.2008 and its amendments till bid submission date, the Central Government, having regard to the expenditure involved in building, maintenance, management and operation of the said section of the said National llighway, interest on the capital invested, reasonable return, the volume of traffic and the period of the said agreement between the Authority and the Concessionaire, hereby notifies that there shall be levied and collected fees on mechanical vehicles at the rate specified in columns (2) of the Table l for net road section length 64.758 km for use of the four and more lane sections (hereinafter referred to as “base rate”) and at one and half times the base rate for bypasses having an aggregate length of 40.012 km on the Type of Vehicles specified in Table. 1 below, and authorizes the said Concessionaire to collect and retain the fee on and from the date of Commercial Operation (COD) declared by the Anthority and on getting the Completion Certificate or the Provisional Certificate, as the case may be, from the Authority or publication of this Notification in the Official Gazette, whichever is later, till the termination date as specified in the agreement;
